domain: consumer electronics enclosures, thermal parts, hinges, stands, and service hardware

ideas.idea_title: Fanless Mini PC Finned Top Shell
ideas.product_context: A compact living-room or office mini PC that uses its upper enclosure as the primary passive heat sink.
ideas.core_function: Protect internal electronics while conducting heat from the processor module to exterior cooling fins.
ideas.likely_main_part: CNC-machined aluminum top enclosure with integrated fin array, internal boss pads, gasket groove, and corner fastener wells.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines thin enclosure walls, dense repeated fins, internal mounting geometry, thermal contact pads, edge radii, recessed screw pockets, and sealing features in one part.

ideas.product_context: A premium ultrabook hinge assembly connecting the display lid to the keyboard deck.
ideas.core_function: Provide controlled rotational resistance while packaging a display cable channel through the hinge region.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge knuckle barrel with alternating hinge ears, axial bore, cable relief slot, torque washer seats, and anti-rotation flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires coaxial cylindrical features, segmented hinge leaves, tight clearances, slots through curved geometry, nested bores, and asymmetric mechanical stops.

ideas.product_context: A desktop stand for a large drawing tablet used by illustrators and industrial designers.
ideas.core_function: Support the tablet at multiple locked drawing angles while routing charging cable clearance behind the device.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined rear support spine with ratchet arc, pivot bosses, cable pass-through, rubber foot pockets, and weight-reducing side pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved ratchet teeth, angled support surfaces, paired pivots, pocketed lightweight structure, cable routing geometry, and repeated locking detents.

ideas.product_context: A service bench fixture for holding smartphones during screen separation, adhesive curing, or frame straightening.
ideas.core_function: Secure a phone frame without crushing buttons, camera bumps, antennas, or fragile glass edges.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined precision clamp jaw with stepped contact pads, reliefs for side buttons, camera bump clearance, dovetail slide interface, and replaceable soft insert pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Introduces product-specific reliefs, asymmetric stepped surfaces, sliding fixture geometry, shallow pockets, tight edge references, and small service-tool features.

ideas.idea_title: Gaming Console SSD Expansion Heat Sink Cover
ideas.product_context: An aftermarket internal cover for a console storage expansion bay that cools a high-speed NVMe SSD.
ideas.core_function: Replace the stock bay cover while spreading SSD heat to exposed ribs and maintaining console airflow clearance.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile machined aluminum bay cover with underside thermal pad land, top-side ribbing, latch notch, screw tab, and airflow chamfers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests a shallow constrained envelope, mixed top and underside detail, ribs, thin walls, offset fastening features, latch geometry, and thermal interface surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Wireless Earbud Case Hinge Reinforcement Insert
ideas.product_context: A repair upgrade insert for cracked charging-case hinges on premium wireless earbuds.
ideas.core_function: Restore lid alignment and hinge strength while fitting inside the original plastic case shell.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tiny machined metal hinge bridge with dual pin bosses, curved shell-matching back face, adhesive keying grooves, and micro screw holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Pushes small-scale CAD detail with curved mating surfaces, miniature bores, thin bosses, adhesive texture grooves, and precise bilateral hinge alignment.

ideas.product_context: A compact field monitor mount for mirrorless camera rigs used by video creators.
ideas.core_function: Hold an external monitor with adjustable tilt while resisting loosening during handheld shooting.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined U-shaped swivel yoke with side trunnion bores, cold-shoe foot, threaded accessory holes, cable clearance scallop, and serrated friction faces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines yoke geometry, coaxial pivot bores, serrated circular faces, threaded hole patterns, undercut-like cable clearance, and camera accessory mounting standards.

ideas.product_context: A rear strap accessory for a VR headset that holds a removable battery pack as a counterweight.
ideas.core_function: Secure the battery, spread load across the head strap, and provide cooling gaps around the pack.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined curved cradle with strap slots, battery retention lips, spring latch pocket, ventilation channels, and cable strain-relief hook.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests ergonomic curvature, strap-through slots, retaining lips, latch pockets, vent channel arrays, cable management hooks, and non-rectangular consumer accessory form.

ideas.product_context: A USB-C laptop docking station with multiple high-power ports and internal regulator heat sources.
ideas.core_function: Serve as the structural bottom chassis while spreading heat from power electronics to the desk-facing metal body.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum lower chassis with internal component islands, thermal pad mesas, connector wall cutouts, screw bosses, and perimeter assembly ledge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires enclosure datum structure, connector-specific openings, multiple internal height levels, bosses, perimeter ledges, thermal pads, and manufacturable corner radii.

ideas.idea_title: E-Reader Waterproof Port Service Plug Frame
ideas.product_context: A replacement service part for a waterproof e-reader charging-port area after repeated port repairs.
ideas.core_function: Hold the USB-C receptacle region, compress a seal, and restore exterior shell stiffness around the port.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined micro frame with USB-C port window, O-ring groove, snap-tab reliefs, tiny fastener ears, and exterior contour matching the e-reader edge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small precise port geometry, seal grooves, thin ears, snap clearances, curved exterior matching surfaces, and repair-focused integration with an existing consumer enclosure.
